profile.name: Ram Kuhite
profile.title: B.Com Computer Application Student & Web Developer
profile.bio: Final-year B.Com in Computer Application student at R.B. College, RTMNU (Umred, Nagpur). Combining technical skills in front-end development with a strong grasp of business workflows to build practical digital systems for Indian users, MSMEs, and public-service initiatives.

projects.title: FinScheme Discovery Platform
projects.description: A government scheme discovery platform that filters welfare schemes based on user eligibility inputs such as age, income, category, and location. Built to simplify access to welfare schemes for Indian users.

projects.title: Chota Sahukaar Digital Ledger
projects.description: A digital ledger management concept designed for small shopkeepers to track udhaar, payments, and customer transactions digitally instead of manual notebooks.

projects.title: Real-Time Weather App
projects.description: A weather application using API integration to display real-time weather information dynamically for any location.

projects.title: Multi-tool Calculator Suite
projects.description: A versatile calculation engine featuring currency conversion, geometric shape calculations, and basic arithmetic functions.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: A responsive personal portfolio website built to showcase projects, skills, internships, and practical experience with a modern glassmorphic UI.

projects.title: Planters Hub Landing Page
projects.description: A responsive landing page created for a plant-related brand concept with modern UI structure, vibrant imagery, and clean section hierarchy.

projects.title: Number Guessing Game
projects.description: A beginner logic-based game demonstrating programming fundamentals, conditional logic, and user interaction handling.

projects.title: Tic-Tac-Toe Game
projects.description: A browser-based game demonstrating DOM manipulation, array matrix evaluation, and classic game logic.

projects.title: Stopwatch Application
projects.description: A stopwatch application using JavaScript timing functions, interval tracking, and interactive start/stop/reset controls.

experience.description: Worked as a Software Developer Intern focusing on practical front-end architecture. Developed a comprehensive Multi-tool Calculator featuring currency conversion and geometric calculations, and built a fully responsive personal Portfolio Website to showcase practical developer capabilities.

Focused on core programming fundamentals, logic building, and third-party service integration. Developed an interactive Number Guessing Game demonstrating game logic and built a dynamic Weather App utilizing live API integration for real-time weather tracking.

Engaged in grassroots community development across nearby villages and MIDC-related areas. Conducted waste management survey work under Swachh Maharashtra Abhiyan 2.0 and educational survey activities. Actively participated in the 'Raste Ki Pathshala' initiative, interacting with migrant labor students, and organized medicinal plant plantation drives with students.
